title: DeadLetterPayload
description: Payload published to aidefense.dead-letter (REQ-3.9/3.10) when a consumer exhausts its retry budget on a message. Wraps the original envelope rather than replacing it, so nothing about the original event is lost.

originalEvent.description: The full original EventEnvelope that failed, unmodified.

failureReason.description: Stable, human-readable reason the retry budget was exhausted.

attempts.description: Number of delivery attempts made before dead-lettering.

topic.description: The topic the original event was consumed from.
